ScrecorderModal.screenRecorderDesc: On Windows, all screens will be recorded and merged into one file; on MacOS, multiple screens will generate multiple files
ScrecorderModal.framerateHelp: Low framerate (below 5fps) is recommended for pentesting to avoid high CPU usage
ScrecorderModal.framerateTooltip: Framerate is the number of screenshots per second
ScrecorderModal.speedHelp: Record high-speed videos directly, no post-processing needed

ScreenRecorderList.deleteDesc: Local video files will also be cleared

ScreenRecorderListItem.deletePopconfirm: Deleting the recording will also delete the local recording file
